nodes.context: One-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1990 in Moordrecht, Netherlands, involved in violent crime, extortion, drug trade, and arms trafficking.
Outlaw motorcycle club with chapters in the Netherlands and Belgium, involved in a feud with Satudarah MC.
Consultative body of major motorcycle clubs in the Netherlands, of which Satudarah MC was a member until expelled in 2011.

edges.context: Feud between Dutch chapters in 2011 and competition in Belgium in 2012.
Satudarah MC was a member of the Council of Eight until expelled in early 2011.
